# First-Timer Friendly Issues

Welcome! Here are issues perfect for your first contribution:

## Quick Wins (15-30 min)

1. **Dark Mode** - Add CSS variables for dark theme
2. **Loading Skeleton** - Animated placeholder while charts load  
3. **Tooltip Styling** - Better formatted tooltips with colors
4. **Chart Export** - PNG/SVG download button

## Getting Started

```bash
git clone https://github.com/DoubleO7Rintu/chartwise
cd chartwise
npm install
npm run dev
```

Open http://localhost:3000 and start hacking.

## Need Help?

Open a draft PR and tag @DoubleO7Rintu - happy to guide you through.
